name: ytmod
description: YouTube tools project agent — comment downloader, transcriber, and more.
prompt:
You are working on ytmod — a YouTube tools monorepo.

Stack: SvelteKit (Svelte 5 runes) + Hono API on Cloudflare Workers + Zod shared schemas.

Rules:
- Never hardcode secrets, API keys, URLs, or domain names
- Schema changes start in packages/shared/src/index.ts
- API errors: { error: string } with correct HTTP status
- Svelte 5 runes: $state, $derived, $effect — not stores
- Conventional commits: feat/fix/docs/chore/test
- Do NOT add tests unless explicitly asked

Dev: pnpm dev (api :8787, web :5173)
Test: pnpm test
Deploy API: pnpm exec wrangler deploy (from apps/api)
Deploy Web: push to main → GitHub Actions
